zh.Comune di Sinopoli, Città metropolitana: 義大利卡拉布里亞雷吉 卡拉布里亞西諾波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli於1170年出生在義大利卡拉布里亞雷吉 卡拉布里亞西諾波利時，他的父親Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI18歲，母親Agnese RUFFO17歲。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1243年享年73歲。

zh-hans.Comune di Sinopoli, Città metropolitana: 意大利卡拉布里亞雷吉 卡拉布里亞西諾波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli于1170年出生在意大利卡拉布里亞雷吉 卡拉布里亞西諾波利时，他的父亲Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI18岁，母亲Agnese RUFFO17岁。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1243年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ruffo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Arturo, Attilio, Attillo, Carmelo, Carmine, Eduardo, Elena, Gustavo, Mario, Ofelia, Rafael, Roberto, Rocco.  Spanish Jose, Carmella, Juan, Raul.
Italian (southern):

from the personal name Ruffo, from Latin Rufus, originally a nickname for someone with red hair, from a dialect form of the standard Latin word rubeus. The name Rufus was borne by various minor early Christian saints.

variants.name: Ruffino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Mariano, Santo, Vincenzo, Antonio, Mario, Rosario, Domenic, Filomena, Gasper, Italo, Sal, Vita.
Italian: from the personal name Ruf(f)ino, from Latin Rufinus, a development of Rufus (see Ruffo ).

variants.name: Ruffin
meanings: English and French: from the Old French personal name Ruffin, from Latin Rufinus, a diminutive of Rufus ‘red’, borne by several early Christian saints, including a 3rd-century martyr of Soissons and a 4th-century Church Father. Compare Ruffo .
English: nickname from Middle English ruffine (Old French rufin) ‘reddish’, for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion.
English: possibly also a nickname from Middle English ruffin ‘fiend, devil’.

variants.name: La Ruffa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Cesare, Eduardo, Italia, Silvio.
Italian (also Laruffa): probably a nickname for someone from a family with red hair (see Ruffo ).

variants.name: Rufo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Mario, Gino, Nino, Pompeo, Rogelio, Romeo, Aldo, Alfonse, Antonino, Benigno, Carmella, Dino, Donato, Emilio, Fortunato, Franco, Giulio, Isidra, Julio, Lauro, Liliana, Onofre.
Italian: variant of   Ruffo  .

variants.name: Ruffolo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Luigi, Aldo, Emilio, Fiorino, Mario, Natale, Serafino, Antonio, Aurelio, Carmine, Duilio, Enrico, Erminio, Ernesto, Filomena, Gaspare, Lilia, Rodolfo, Rosario, Sergio.
Italian (Calabria): from a pet form of the personal name   Ruffo  .

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Sinopoli
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Antonio, Salvatore, Angelo, Annunziata, Francesco, Italo, Vincenza.
Italian (Calabria): habitational name from Sinopoli in Reggio Calabria.

nameMeanings.name: Giordano
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical, name of the river Jordan. See Jordan .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Wondrous’ or ‘enlightenment’.
2  ♀ ‘Fine jade’.

en.lifeSummary: When Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli was born in 1170, in Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italy, his father, Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI, was 18 and his mother, Agnese RUFFO, was 17. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1243, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli est né en 1170, à Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italie, son père, Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Agnese RUFFO, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1243, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli 1170 in Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI 18 und seine Mutter Agnese RUFFO 17. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1243 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli è nato il nel 1170 nel Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italia, il suo padre, Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Agnese RUFFO, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1243, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Comune di Sinopoli, Città metropolitana: イタリアカラブリアレグジオ カラブリアシノポリ
ja.lifeSummary: Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoliが1170年にイタリアカラブリアレグジオ カラブリアシノポリで生まれた時，父Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLIは18歳，母Agnese RUFFOは17歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1243年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli(이)가 1170년 이탈리아 캘라브리아 레조 캘라브리아 시노폴리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnese RUFFO(은)는 17세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1243년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli nasceu em 1170, em Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Itália, seu pai, Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Agnese RUFFO, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1243, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli родился в 1170 г. в местности синополи, регио калабря, калабря, Италия, его отцу по имени Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnese RUFFO, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1243 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giordano II Ruffo di Sinopoli nació en 1170, en Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italia, su papá, Giordano Ier RUFFO di SINOPOLI, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Agnese RUFFO, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1243, a la edad de 73 años.
